items.question: State the limit definition of f′(x) and give the geometric interpretation.
items.answer: f′(x) = lim_{h→0}(f(x+h)-f(x))/h, the slope of the tangent line to y=f(x) at x.

items.question: Why does the sigmoid saturate and what happens to its derivative?
items.answer: σ(x)→0 or 1 for large |x|; σ′(x)=σ(1-σ)→0, shrinking gradient signal in saturated regions.
